title: Minecraft Bedrock Dimension 1.18.0
description: A custom dimension definition for a behavior pack.

dimension_definition.title: Dimension Definition
dimension_definition.description: Defines a custom dimension with its description and components.

dimension_description.title: Dimension Description
dimension_description.description: Declares the unique identifier for a dimension.

dimension_components.title: Dimension Components
dimension_components.description: Specifies the components that define dimension properties such as bounds and generation.

dimension_bounds.title: Dimension Bounds
dimension_bounds.description: Defines the minimum and maximum vertical bounds for a dimension.

min.description: Minimum vertical bound for the dimension.

max.description: Maximum vertical bound for the dimension.

dimension_generation.title: Dimension Generation
dimension_generation.description: Specifies the generator type used for world generation in the dimension.
